title: Commercial cleaning robot guides
metaDescription: Cleaning robot guides: scrubber and vacuum costs, RaaS cleaning subscriptions, and when autonomous cleaning beats staffing for retail, office, and industrial floors.
intro: Commercial cleaning robots range from compact office vacuums to large autonomous scrubbers. These articles cover pricing, subscription models, and deployment fit for facilities teams.

summarySections.heading: What this topic covers
bullets: Purchase and RaaS price ranges for scrubbers and vacuums
How floor area, mess level, and frequency affect ROI
Cross-links to staff comparison and matcher tools

faqs.question: How much does a cleaning robot cost per month on RaaS?
faqs.answer: Compact units often run roughly $800–$2,000/month; large scrubbers roughly $2,000–$5,000/month depending on coverage, service tier, and contract length.

faqs.question: Do cleaning robots replace janitorial staff?
faqs.answer: They usually automate repetitive floor work on open areas. Staff still handle restrooms, detail work, and obstacles robots cannot reach.
